segments.text: Oh, heading there! That risky moment, sending them out!
segments.original_text: あ そこへ行こう じゃ外ヒヤリとしたところを外に出す

segments.text: Early nair edgeguard, nice! No invincibility there—the spin is the bair
segments.original_text: 復帰阻止早めの空N うまい無敵ないんですよねスピンは空後

segments.text: Another airdodge recovery, but watching that ledge situation... quick thinking! And from before, forward...
segments.original_text: これも移動回避で帰ってきたが崖の展開見てるー 脳が早いやさっきね横

full_text: Oh, heading there! That risky moment, sending them out! Early nair edgeguard, nice! No invincibility there—the spin is the bair Another airdodge recovery, but watching that ledge situation... quick thinking! And from before, forward...

corrections.original: あそこへ行こう じゃあへヒヤリとしたところを外に出す
corrections.corrected: あ そこへ行こう じゃ外ヒヤリとしたところを外に出す

corrections.original: 復帰阻止早めのベビー

corrections.rule: move abbrev: 空中バー→空後
